category_sources: source_facts.description says powerful cross-platform ls; official README describes a feature-rich, customizable, cross-platform ls alternative.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "g"; source_facts.name/package id is g-ls for the Homebrew formula.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage and links more options/man.md; README lists the production landing page as https://equationzhao.github.io/g/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/Equationzhao/g; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says cross-platform ls; official README lists icons/colors, layouts, git integration, sorting, Linux/Windows/macOS support, fuzzy path matching, and hyperlink support.
